accommodations.text: Provide audio versions of grade-level texts.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide audio versions of grade-level texts.

accommodations.text: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.

accommodations.text: Provide a written or visual schedule of activities for each period.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a written or visual schedule of activities for each period.

accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy (social communication): 30 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 1 time weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.
Specialized academic instruction (reading): 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.
Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
